# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Scope

- [ ] Strategy docs
- [ ] Architecture/API docs
- [ ] Onboarding docs
- [ ] Quality/DevOps docs
- [ ] User/Ops docs
- [ ] Figma prompt docs

## Validation

- [ ] `markdownlint` passed
- [ ] internal links checked
- [ ] OpenAPI lint passed (if API changed)

## Documentation and Governance Checklist

- [ ] Docs index updated if file paths changed
- [ ] Related docs cross-links updated
- [ ] ADR added for architectural changes
- [ ] Compliance matrix updated if control behavior changed
- [ ] Runbook updates included for operational impact

## Risk and Rollback

- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Rollback approach for documentation/process impact:

## Related References

- PRD section:
- ADR:
- Incident / ticket:
